creator: paul@jackie.home.net
text:
totem gives error of missing plugin on gnome2.20 when trying to play dvds

How-To-Repeat: install gnome 2.20 from ports, get atapicam module loaded and set permissions, start dbus and hald and gnome=yes  from rc.conf otherwise there are errors at bootup with just gnome=yes. Insert dvd in player. Start movieplayer and then nothing.
